ORDER REGARDING VELLUTINI CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO BUILD GROUP, INC'S FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-07-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS DEFENDANT VELLUTINI CORPORATION'S, DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT AS TO THE FIRST, SECOND, THIRD AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT FILED BY BUILD GROUP, INC. IS SUSTAINED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL FOUR CAUSES OF ACTION THAT ARE THE SUBJECT OF THIS DEMURRER. THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION DOES NOT ADEQUATELY EXPLAIN WHY BUILD GROUP ALLEGES BREACH OF BOTH EXPRESS AND IMPLIED WARRANTIES, WHICH ON ITS FACE APPEARS INCONSISTENT. ALL OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION THAT ARE THE SUBJECT OF THIS DEMURRER ALLEGE LIABILITY WITH REFERENCE TO FINDINGS REGARDING ALTA LAGUNA'S ALLEGATIONS, YET IT APPEARS THAT THERE ARE NOT AND WILL NEVER BE ANY SUCH FINDINGS. FOR CLARITY AND SUBSTANTIVE SUFFICIENCY, BUILD GROUP SHOULD RE-ALLEGE ITS CLAIMS IN LIGHT OF THE RESOLUTION OF THE ALTA LAGUNA LAWSUIT AND ALLEGE, AS PRECISELY AS IT IS NOW ABLE, THE RELIEF THAT IT SEEKS BY WAY OF THOSE CLAIMS. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-27-2017 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Advanced From Oct-26-17 To Oct-18-17 At 01:00 P.M. In Dept 210

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2017 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-18-2017 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

CROSS DEFENDANT VELLUTINI CORPORATION's, DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT as to the first, second, third and fifth causes of action in the first amended cross-complaint filed by Build Group, Inc. is SUSTAINED with twenty days leave to amend as to all four causes of action that are the subject of this demurrer. The first cause of action does not adequately explain why Build Group alleges breach of both express and implied warranties, which on its face appears inconsistent. All of the causes of action that are the subject of this demurrer allege liability with reference to findings regarding Alta Laguna's allegations, yet it appears that there are not and will never be any such findings. For clarity and substantive sufficiency, Build Group should re-allege its claims in light of the resolution of the Alta Laguna lawsuit and allege, as precisely as it is now able, the relief that it seeks by way of those claims. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
